testcase.name: test_login_no_tenant_header
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_endocrinopront.py:128: in test_login_no_tenant_header assert resp.status_code in [401, 400], f"Expected 401/400, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 401/400, got 201: {"accessToken":"eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJkYTZmZjNhZC0wMGU1LTQ0ZTEtOGVjYy0zNjIwMjU0NTk4MTkiLCJ0ZW5hbnRJZCI6ImNsaXRlbmFudDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDEiLCJlbWFpbCI6InJhZmFlbGxhcmFyNjVAZ21haWwuY29tIiwicm9sZXMiOlsiTUVESUNPIl0sImlhdCI6MTc3MjQ5MTA5OCwiZXhwIjoxNzcyNDkxOTk4fQ.q6bi-Cgz4JExqISHJZaFlICoV0iAlfGskohkzvIaqf8","refreshToken":"xdl0xPlHVRjh9dm5gAgcouMetm4438KaDgqU4wlGIcqb8PiBwBHgD_24El4sScWt","user":{"id":"da6ff3ad-00e5-44e1-8ecc-362025459819","tenantId":"clitenant0000000000000001","email":"rafaellarar65@gmail.com","fullName":"Dr. Administrador","roles":["MEDICO"]}} E assert 201 in [401, 400] E + where 201 = <Response [201]>.status_code
